representative_quotes: I do think photonics and memory are the 2 top themes though, with optics being very early into the supercycle.

If you see a bunch of projections on memory names like Samsung becoming the most profitable company in the world in 2028... Might be a good idea to think independently outside of the narratives at the time
By investing in the critical companies to give them more capex spend for FAU capacity / yields... it builds up Western supply chains to make what’s technologically challenging, possible.

xiaomustock.recent_shift: 近期观点更加坚定看好存储，尤其是海力士，并强调短期内SPCX上市相关资金流动利好市场，但后续对SPCX保持谨慎需正式合同。
representative_quotes: 存储这波不仅卡住了AI的脖子，也卡了传统电子产品的脖子。存储涨完什么涨？当然还是存储涨！
海力士这一段是目前市面上确定性非常高的机会，45天内这些利好都要发生。准备大仓位捏45天。
如果真懂了你买的股票，坚信你自己的买入原因，那跌的时候反而是兴奋，可以买到更多更便宜的筹码了，而不是割肉。
